 Options View Legend Legend
Racenet Form Abbreviations
Legend
  • t = Won @ track
  • d = Won @ distance
  • HT = Home Track
  • o = Last or not in first nine last start
  • s = Won on soft
  • h = Won on heavy
  • n = Won at night
  • b = Beaten favourite latest run
  • (G) = Gelded
  • D/A = Dual Acceptors
Last 10 Results
  • x = Spell
  • F = Failed to finish
  • L = Lost rider
Abbreviations For Video Comments
  • App = approaching
  • H/Out = Hung Out
  • MF = midfield
  • S/A = slow away
  • TAL = tearaway leader
  • WB = well back
  • COT = Change of tactics
  • H/S = Hampered Start
  • MSG = Made some ground
  • SG = saved ground
  • t'out = throughout
  • Wd = weakened
  • DRO = didn't run on
  • J awk = Jumped awkwardly
  • NC = no cover
  • U/p = Under Pressure
  • tt = to turn
  • WPFT = Winning post first time
  • DGO = didn't go on
  • k-up = knocked up
  • O/L = outside lead
  • S/L = shared lead
  • u/u = used up
  • D/N = did nothing
  • L = lengths
  • O/R = over-raced
  • Strt = straight
  • WTMF = worse than midfield
  • H/In = Hung In
  • Lpos = lost position
  • ROS = Ran strongly in straight
  • t = turn
  • W = wide
  • WNC = wide no cover
Abbreviations for Pace of race
  • OPF = On Pace Favoured
  • BMF = Backmarkers favoured
  • F = Fair
Abbreviations for Track Analysis
  • TF = Track fair
  • BGW = Best going out wide
  • BGI = Best going inside
Print

R1 Bisley Workwear Reginald Allen Quality

1400m
Class: Group 3, 3-Y-O, Fillies, Quality
Resulted
Tips & Race Analysis

Analysis

Hard to split the top two selections. PROFOUNDLY narrowly beaten when heavily backed last start at Doomben and has two placings from three runs this prep at metro level, one of the main hopes. SNITZEL DANCER won or placed in two races to start career, a real threat. SAMARELLE let-up and has had a flying start to their career, don't dismiss. CHATTERLEY yet to miss the placegetters in three runs and in the money last start running second at Newcastle when first up, in with a chance.

Selections

  • 2. Profoundly (9) $12.00
  • 3. Snitzel Dancer (6) $5.50
  • 5. Samarelle (1) $4.60
  • 6. Chatterley (3) $7.50
